title: Korean-Style Radish Crumble
description: A sweet and spicy crumble made with radish, perfect as a side dish or dessert. This recipe combines the crunch of radish with the warmth of Korean spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated radish, sugar, flour, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper.
Stir in Korean crumble until well combined.
Transfer mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Top with additional Korean crumble to taste.
Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until top is golden brown and radish is tender.
Serve warm, topped with additional Korean crumble if desired.
